function T(T)return E[T+(-440416-(-472757))]end for T,J in ipairs({{-329041-(-329042),623328-622166},{-877651+877652;-182670-(-183184)};{110141-109626,970161-968999}})do while J[599668-599667]<J[-53258-(-53260)]do E[J[-357881-(-357882)]],E[J[-564753-(-564755)]],J[1019626-1019625],J[883424-883422]=E[J[143349+-143347]],E[J[-717530+717531]],J[278284-278283]+(-46470+46471),J[-782987-(-782989)]-(873945+-873944)end end do local T=string.sub local J=math.floor local C=table.concat local L=E local t=type local return(function(E,C,L,t,p,u,a,P,l,V,h,Q,I,b,S,A,J,O,r,v,d,N,D)v,J,d,V,D,O,l,b,N,h,A,S,P,I,r,Q=function(E,T)local C=I(T)local L=function(L,t,p)return J(E,{L,t;p},T,C)end return L
